creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:
On, Thu Sep 07, 2006, Boris B. Samorodov wrote:

> Hi!
> 
> Thanks for taking care of the port!
> Since you use the port and it is orphant now, maybe you may become a
> maintainer?

I am not actively using it, but can keep an eye on it, so we reduce the
ports@freebsd.org list ;-).

Can you take care of changing the MAINTAINER line to
    MAINTAINER=   mva@sysfault.org
on commit?

Regards
Marcus
